person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
A significant amount of uncertainty remains surrounding the wife of Rev. John Mayo and a lack of primary source documentation has led to conjecture or even silence among recognized genealogists. Did Rev. John Mayo have one wife or two? If two then it is almost certain that both had the given name Tamison (Tamsen, Thomasine). In his own writing, Rev. Mayo spells her name three different ways all of which indicate it was pronounced as three syllables.

It is seen in some research that Rev. Mayo married a second time about 1672 but this is without documentation and appears to involve Tamsen Lumpkin's, wife of his son Samuel, mother who was also named Tamsen. There is no record of the death of a first wife of Rev. Mayo and there does not appear to be any primary source documentation of a second marriage to another woman also named Tamsen (Tamison, Thomasine). However, the wording of the estate settlement signed by his wife Tamison is curious, "'excepting only the good and estate which she had before their intermarriage, which she had not claimed right nor power to despose of, but only to use while they lived together as she affirmeth." 

The extensive discourse on Rev. John Mayo in NEHGR in 1941 is largely silent on the subject of his wife where she is mentioned in two sentences. Jean Mayo-Rodwick in her magnum opus on the Mayo's provides documentation of the marriage of Rev John Mayo. By 1618 it is believed John traveled to Leiden, Netherlands, where William Brewster had led a group that broke from the Church of England. Here the marriage of John Mayo [Jan Meyer in Dutch] and Tamisen Brike [Timmosijn Breyck] is recorded 21 Mar 1618. It is believed the children of John and Tamisen were born in Leiden however the baptismal register of Rev Goodyear of the English church in Leiden has not survived and an extensive search of similar records has not produced baptismal records for the children.

Tamison's date of death is seen variously as 1682 or 26 Feb 1682/83 in Yarmouth.

«b»Children«/b»
Note: baptismal records for Leiden, Netherlands English church where they would have been baptized have not survived. Probable birth dates and birth order are extrapolated from numerous sources. See the Mayo-Rodwick book cited in Sources for details.

1.) Hannah b c 1620, m Nathaniel Bacon 4 Dec 1642 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony. Died after August 1691.

2.) Samuel b c 1625. Married Tamsen Lumpkin c 1644, d by Apr 1664.

3.) Nathaniel b c 1627. Married Hannah Prence, daughter of Thomas Prence and Elizabeth Brewster, 14 Feb 1648/9 in Eastham. Died after 19 Dec 1661.

4.) John b c 1630. Married Hannah Lecraft 1 Jan 1650/51 in Eastham. Died 1706.

5.) Elizabeth b c 1632, married Joseph Howes c 1653. Died 16 Mar 1700/01.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Brike於1597年出生在英國艾可可爾斯特聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇時，她的父親Wilhelm Brike22歲，母親Susanna Duijck19歲。她於1618年3月21日與Reverend John Mayo Jr.在荷蘭霍蘭萊登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1671年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯且於1676年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德亞爾姆斯。她去世於1683年2月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年86歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波丹尼斯。

variants.name: Bright
meanings: English: usually a nickname from Middle English bright ‘bright, good-looking, fresh-faced’ (Old English beorht ‘bright, shining’).

English: perhaps occasionally from an unrecorded Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Briht, Beorht, from a short form of any of several Old English personal names of which beorht was the first element, such as Beorhtrīc ‘bright’ + ‘powerful’. Compare Bert .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Brike was born in 1597, in St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, England, her father, Wilhelm Brike, was 22 and her mother, Susanna Duijck, was 19. She married Reverend John Mayo Jr. on 21 March 1618, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1671 and Yarmouth, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1676. She died on 26 February 1683, in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 86, and was buried in Dennis, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Elle a vécu à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1671 et à Yarmouth, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1676. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1683, à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Dennis, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Brikeが1597年にイギリスエセックスコルチェスタースト ボトルフ'ス チャーチで生まれた時，父Wilhelm Brikeは22歳，母Susanna Duijckは19歳であった。1618年3月21日にオランダホーランドレイデンでReverend John Mayo Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1671年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルヤーモウスに，1676年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニークウンバーランドヤーモウスに住んでいた。彼女は1683年2月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルヤーモウスで86歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルデニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Brike(이)가 1597년 영국 에세스 코체스터 스트 벗프'스 c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wilhelm Brike(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Duijck(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1618년 3월 21일 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 Reverend John Mayo Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1671년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 야모우스에서, 1676년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 c벌랜드 야모우스에서 살았다. 그녀는 1683년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 야모우스에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Brike nasceu em 1597, em St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Wilhelm Brike, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Duijck, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Reverend John Mayo Jr. em 21 de março de 1618, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1671 e em Yarmouth, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1676. Ela faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1683, em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Dennis, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Brike родилась в 1597 г. в местности ст ботолф'с чурч, колчестир, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Wilhelm Brike было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Susanna Duijck, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reverend John Mayo Jr. 21 марта 1618 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1671 году и в местности ярмоут, кумбирланд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1676 году. Она умерла 26 февраля 1683 г. в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности деннис, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasine Brike nació en 1597, en St Botolph's Church, Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Wilhelm Brike, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Susanna Duijck, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Reverend John Mayo Jr. el 21 de marzo de 1618, en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Yarmouth, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1671 y en Yarmouth, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1676. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1683, en Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Dennis, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
